fundamentals.name: iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The fund will invest at least 80% of its assets in the component securities of the underlying index, and it will invest at least 90% of its assets in U.S. Treasury securities that the advisor believes will help the fund track the underlying index. The underlying index measures the performance of public obligations of the U.S. Treasury that have a remaining maturity greater than or equal to twenty years.

news.paragraph: TLT holders have experienced a significant 50% decline, highlighting the substantial risk in long-dated treasuries even without defaults. Recent articles focus on this steep sell-off, with some suggesting a potential buying opportunity amid the deepening decline, while others note investor sentiment leaning towards further yield increases. The lack of specific corporate catalysts suggests price action will be driven by broader interest rate movements and market sentiment.
